name: @chankov/agent-fleet
description: Multi-agent fleet orchestration for coding agents. Pi as the primary runtime, Herdr as the workspace control plane, coms as the peer data plane, and Hermes for remote control — plus skills, personas, harnesses, and a guided setup CLI.
author: Nikolay Chankov

scripts.test: node bin/cli.js --version && node bin/cli.js --help && node bin/cli.js transform-persona --list --agent claude-code && node --test "bin/test/*.test.js" scripts/agent-hub-helpers.test.mjs scripts/agent-hub-spawn.test.mjs scripts/agent-hub-delegate.test.mjs scripts/agent-hub-research.test.mjs .pi/harnesses/lib/herdr-client.test.ts .pi/harnesses/lib/herdr-presence.test.ts scripts/coms-cli.test.ts scripts/lib/codex-conductor.test.ts scripts/lib/codex-remote-control.test.ts scripts/lib/team-project.test.ts scripts/lib/herdr-layout.test.ts scripts/lib/spawn-stagger.test.ts scripts/lib/fleet-extras.test.ts scripts/lib/team-snapshot.test.ts scripts/lib/coms-envelope.test.ts scripts/lib/claude-bridge-core.test.ts scripts/lib/hermes-bridge-core.test.ts scripts/coms-hermes-bridge.test.ts .pi/harnesses/ask-user-remote/race-core.test.js .pi/harnesses/ask-user-remote/index.test.ts .pi/extensions/btw/state.test.js .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/footer.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/run-budget.test.js .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/drift-watchdog.test.js .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/return-contract.test.js .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/backend-policy.test.js .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/artifacts.test.js .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/scope-gate.test.js .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/evidence-rules.test.js .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/research-retention.test.js .pi/harnesses/damage-control/shared.test.js .pi/harnesses/damage-control/herdr-rules.test.js .pi/harnesses/damage-control-continue/exemptions.test.js scripts/lib/hermes-monitor-model.test.ts scripts/lib/hermes-monitor-store.test.ts scripts/lib/hermes-monitor-retention.integration.test.ts scripts/lib/hermes-monitor-registry.test.ts scripts/lib/hermes-monitor-socket.test.ts scripts/lib/hermes-monitor-data-path.test.ts scripts/lib/hermes-monitor-slice7-9-backend.test.ts scripts/lib/hermes-monitor-control-socket.test.ts scripts/lib/hermes-monitor-e2e.test.ts scripts/hermes-monitor-capability-runner.test.ts scripts/hermes-monitor-scenario.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-control.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-live-bridge-gaps.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-review-live-wiring.red.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-runtime.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-bridge-runtime.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-reconcile.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-recovery.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-lifecycle-lease.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-session-bridge-race.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-session-bridge.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-cancel-race.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-wait-only.test.ts .pi/harnesses/agent-hub/monitor-index.integration.test.ts
scripts.version:changeset: node bin/force-patch-changesets.js && changeset version && node bin/sync-harness-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund && node bin/snapshot-version.js
